summary: Designer Assignment Tracking System testing completed successfully. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with Designer Assignment Panel visible in Team tab, Assign Designer modal working, Assignment History collapsible, and Attribution Rules info box displayed.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/projects/{id}/designer-assignments returns 200
Backend: Response contains project_id, current_primary, assignments, total_assignments, active_count
Backend: Assignment records have all required fields (assignment_id, designer_id, designer_name, role, assigned_from, assigned_to, etc.)
Backend: GET assignments for non-existent project returns 404
Backend: GET assignments without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/designer-assignment-options returns 200
Backend: Options contain roles (Primary, Support)
Backend: Options contain assignment_reasons (initial, reassigned, resigned, escalation, workload_balance)
Backend: POST assignment without auth returns 401
Backend: POST with invalid role returns 400
Backend: POST with invalid reason returns 400
Backend: POST with non-existent designer returns 404
Backend: PUT end assignment without auth returns 401
Backend: PUT end non-existent assignment returns 404
Backend: Full assignment workflow - get assignments, verify current primary, verify only one active Primary
Backend: Assignment attribution fields are valid ISO timestamps
Backend: Designer dashboard API accessible
Backend: Designer dashboard returns proper structure for attribution
Frontend: Login with founder credentials successful
Frontend: Project Details page loads correctly
Frontend: Team tab navigation works
Frontend: Designer Assignment Panel visible with data-testid
Frontend: Current Primary Designer displayed with name, badge, and date
Frontend: End button visible for current Primary
Frontend: Assign Designer button opens modal
Frontend: Modal contains Designer dropdown, Role dropdown, Reason dropdown, Notes textarea
Frontend: Modal shows warning when assigning new Primary
Frontend: Assignment History toggle expands/collapses
Frontend: Past assignments show dates and end reason
Frontend: Attribution Rules info box displays all three rules
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py (lines 8952-9296): Designer assignment APIs properly implement CRUD with soft-delete pattern
Backend: Only one active Primary enforced - when assigning new Primary, previous is automatically ended
Backend: Assignments cannot be deleted, only ended (preserves accountability history)
Backend: get_primary_designer_at_event() function supports attribution for dashboards
Frontend DesignerAssignmentPanel.jsx: Well-structured component with proper state management
Frontend: Modal shows warning when replacing current Primary designer
Frontend: Attribution Rules clearly displayed for user understanding
Migration script (migrate_designer_assignments.py): Creates initial assignments for existing projects
seed_data_creation: Used existing test project proj_126a928d with 2 designer assignments (1 active Primary, 1 ended)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Designer Assignment Tracking System is fully functional. Backend APIs tested via pytest (19 tests passed). Frontend UI tested via Playwright. Project proj_126a928d has 2 assignments in history (1 active Primary: user_019f398f4caf, 1 ended: user_5744e526f9ae). The Team tab (formerly Collaborators) now shows Designer Assignments panel at the top. Attribution rules are: Sign-Off KPIs → Primary at sign-off, Cancelled → Primary at cancellation, Active → Current Primary.

designer_assignment_apis.POST /api/projects/{id}/designer-assignm: Creates new assignment, ends current Primary if assigning new Primary

frontend_ui.Designer Assignment Panel: Visible in Team tab with current Primary and history
frontend_ui.Assign Designer Modal: Opens with Designer/Role/Reason dropdowns and Notes

business_rules.only_one_primary: Only one active Primary designer per project
business_rules.soft_delete: Assignments cannot be deleted, only ended
business_rules.attribution: Primary at Sign-Off owns KPIs, Primary at Cancellation owns KPIs

migration.status: Ran successfully - created initial assignments for existing projects
